Name: -1_lot_tastes_generally_sense
Representative_Docs: ["Someone with bad taste would suggest or display something that not a lot of people find appealing. With the movie example it could be someone who chooses movies that most people wouldn't enjoy.", "If a person does not critically analyze their choices and follows along with trends they are likely to have bad taste. Often, they will like anything that they're told to like and don't have much of a personal sense of taste.", "Generally they are rude, vulgar and like things that are insulting to others.  If they wear a shirt that says 'I'm with stupid' or has foul language I would say they have bad taste."]

Name: 0_say_art_likes_does
Representative_Docs: ['Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste.', 'Bad taste can be different to everyone, for me it would be something I dislike. An example: if I dislike a piece of art and someone else likes it, I would say this person has bad taste in art.', 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste.']

Name: 1_choices_care_make_unappealing
Representative_Docs: ['Raunchy choices and/or a big member of the "see me" group who seem to make choices only for attention and no other reason', "I think that the person doesn't think very hard about their decision in regards to aesthetic choices. I also think that they may not think about how individual pieces of their choices fit together to form a big picture, as well as never evolving their taste.", "They are usually just drawn to the flashy, lowest common denominator type of content or aesthetic. I'm all for well crafted, trashy tv or trendy, soon-to-be-forgotten fashion but it's like any diet: variety is something that is a benefit."]

Name: 2_loud_sense_bold_boo
Representative_Docs: ['I think of someone who is loud common uncouth tacky or crass. I think of tacky attire and loud colors not bold but loud colors.', "Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn't realize that others may take offense. A person who can't distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority.", 'Someone who watches conspiracy theory shows and drama based reality TV about people’s personal lives. Ancient Aliens and similar shows acively try to mislead people. Shows like Honey Boo Boo and similar just encourage drama amongst the people involved.']

Name: 3_music_movies_enjoy_shows
Representative_Docs: ["Someone has a bad taste in something when they enjoy something I do not; for example I would say someone might have a 'bad taste' in movies if they watch a lot of rom-coms. Someone else could also say that they have a good taste in movies; it is very subjective.", 'When someone has "bad taste" I tend to think they enjoy media, books, and food made for the lowest common denominator. They are easily entertained by things like reality television, Michael Bay films with tons of explosions, and their favorite music is whatever the latest generic popular rap/pop artist has on the radio.', 'I mean that someone is a mindless consumer. They watch the shows that everyone else watches, just to fit in. They listen to whatever pablum comes on the radio. They enjoy the lowest common denominator. I have described a band before as "music for people who don\'t like music". People who like those insipid bands have bad tatse']

Name: 4_usually_quality_acceptable_racist
Representative_Docs: ['Usually it is when someone loves something trashy or super offensive in some way. This could be extremely racist or just in poor taste all around', 'It means they do not have a clue about what looks good, what is quality, what is in style, is desirable. Usually they like gaudy and tacky things that may be expensive but horrible looking.', 'Usually it is about gaining noteriety at the expense of quality. It is a the immature desire tp shock others in negative ways and usually means poor quality.']

Name: 5_poor_violence_manner_humor
Representative_Docs: ['If someone finds humor by making fun of someone.  If there is violence, or abuse.', 'The person would choose comedy, for example, that includes vulgarity, racism, or violence. It is a lack of consideration for those around them who might find these things objectionable.', 'Questionable behavior, handles situations in a poor manner, either by action or words. Gives people a bad vibe in their manner.']
